zh.lifeSummary: 當Johannes Smythe, Lord of Blackmoor Manor於1500年8月4日出生在英國英格蘭艾可利文哈爾時，他的父親Hugh Smith58歲，母親Mrs. Anne Smith53歲。他於1560年7月7日與Agnes Idle在英國越可爾哈利法可結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1544年8月4日在英國艾可布拉可莫享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johannes Smythe, Lord of Blackmoor Manor于1500年8月4日出生在英国英格兰艾可利文哈爾时，他的父亲Hugh Smith58岁，母亲Mrs. Anne Smith53岁。他于1560年7月7日与Agnes Idle在英国越可爾哈利法可结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1544年8月4日在英国艾可布拉可莫享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Smythe,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): variant of   Smith  .

variants.name: Smith
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Blackmoor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English:  see  Blackmore  .

variants.name: Blackmore
meanings: habitational name from any of various places so named with Old English blæc ‘black, dark’ + mōr ‘moor, marsh’ or mere ‘lake’. Mōr is the second element of places called Blackmore in Essex, Wiltshire, and Worcestershire, as well as Blackmoor in Dorset; mere, on the other hand, is the second element of Blackmore in Hertfordshire and Blackmoor in Hampshire, the early forms of which are Blachemere, Blakemere.
from Middle English blak, blakke ‘black’ + Mor ‘Moor’, signifying someone with a dark complexion.
English:

nameMeanings.name: Manor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Mayner  .
Jewish (Israeli): modern Hebrew name meaning ‘loom’.
Altered form of French Ménard (see Menard ), reflecting the characteristic Canadian and American French rounding of the -ard ending.

variants.name: Mayner
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French and Middle English personal name Mainer, from ancient Germanic Maginhari, composed of the elements magin ‘strength, might’ + hari, heri ‘army’. Compare Mainer , Maynor , Manor , and Mannor .
Americanized form of German   Mainer  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Johannes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Johannes Smythe, Lord of Blackmoor Manor was born on 4 August 1500, in Rivenhall, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh Smith, was 58 and his mother, Mrs. Anne Smith, was 53. He married Agnes Idle on 7 July 1560, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 4 August 1544, in Blackmore, Essex, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johannes Smythe, Lord of Blackmoor Manor est né le 4 août 1500, à Rivenhall, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Smith, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Anne Smith, avait 53 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Idle le 7 juillet 1560, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 août 1544, à Blackmore, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johannes Smythe, Lord of Blackmoor Manor am 4. August 1500 in Rivenhall, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Smith 58 und seine Mutter Mrs. Anne Smith 53. Er hat am 7. Juli 1560 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England Agnes Idle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. August 1544 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Blackmore, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johannes Smythe, Lord of Blackmoor Manor è nato il il 4 agosto 1500 nel Rivenhall, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh Smith, aveva 58 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Anne Smith, aveva 53 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Idle il 7 luglio 1560, nel Halifax, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 4 agosto 1544, nel Blackmore, Essex, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johannes Smythe, Lord of Blackmoor Manorが1500年8月4日にイギリスイギリスエセックスリベンハルで生まれた時，父Hugh Smithは58歳，母Mrs. Anne Smithは53歳であった。1560年7月7日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスでAgnes Idleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1544年8月4日にイギリスエセックスブラクモーで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johannes Smythe, Lord of Blackmoor Manor(이)가 1500년 8월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 라이븐홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Smith(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Anne Smith(은)는 53세였다. 그는 1560년 7월 7일 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에서 Agnes Idle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1544년 8월 4일 영국 에세스 블랙모어에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.August 04, 1500–4 August 1544: 4 de agosto de 1500–4 de agosto de 1544
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johannes Smythe, Lord of Blackmoor Manor nasceu em 4 de agosto de 1500, em Rivenhall, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Smith, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Anne Smith, tinha 53 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Idle em 7 de julho de 1560, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1544, em Blackmore, Essex, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johannes Smythe, Lord of Blackmoor Manor родился 4 августа 1500 г. в местности ривенолл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh Smith было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Anne Smith, 53. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Idle 7 июля 1560 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 4 августа 1544 г. в местности блэккмор, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.August 04, 1500–4 August 1544: 4 de agosto de 1500–4 de agosto de 1544
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johannes Smythe, Lord of Blackmoor Manor nació el 4 de agosto de 1500, en Rivenhall, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Smith, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Mrs. Anne Smith, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Agnes Idle el 7 de julio de 1560, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1544, en Blackmore, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
